'''Kkekkrrg rro''', also called '''Shadow Keepers''', were predators that lived on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. They had five limbs, which fascinated [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologists]]. However, none were ever captured alive or dead, and no corpses were ever found.

{{Creature-stub}}
